## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this PR. Link any related issues (e.g., Closes #12).

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🩺 Question database correction or addition
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Testing implementation

## Checklist
- [ ] The app builds cleanly with `npm run build`.
- [ ] UI changes have been verified on mobile and desktop viewports.
- [ ] Question additions/corrections are supported by clinical references in the description.
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format.
